pages.title: Pelian - AI Development Agency | AI Agents, Voice AI, Custom Apps
pages.description: Pelian is an AI development agency that builds AI agents, voice AI, custom applications, and workflow automation. Founded in 2023. Ships in weeks, not quarters.
pages.markdown:
Pelian

# End-to-end AIengineering &transformation.

[Our services](https://www.pelian.ai/#services) Contact us

Everyideacouldbecomeaproduct.Everyproductcoulddomorewithless.Everyweekyouwait,thegapgetswider.

## Our services

Agents that replace entire roles. Products that learn from every user. Systems that run without you.Built in weeks.

### AI on your team

Siena Sinner

Summarize this report

report-2025.pdf

AI

AI agent

Thinking

### Agent Orchestration

Autonomous agents that own entire workflows - sourcing deals, running campaigns, processing applications. Not bots. Teammates that never sleep.

### Voice Agents

AI that handles calls, books meetings, and qualifies leads without anyone picking up the phone. One client automated 60% of inbound calls.

### AI in your products

### Document Retrieval

Instant answers from every doc your company has ever created. Like a teammate with perfect memory who reads everything and forgets nothing.

### Custom Applications

AI-native web apps, mobile apps, and internal tools - designed, built, and shipped around your exact workflow and data.

### AI in your operations

HubSpot

New contact form submission

Airtable

Add data to Airtable

OpenAI

Write personalised message

### Automate Tasks

Connect HubSpot, Airtable, Slack, and your entire stack into pipelines that run 24/7. The glue work between your tools disappears.

+32%

15%

### Business Consulting

Not sure where AI fits? We audit your operations, find the highest-leverage opportunities, and build a roadmap that pays for itself.

## The difference

### We run on what we sell.

Our own team is powered by the same AI we build for clients. We ship faster because we’ve already solved the hard problems internally.

### Shipped in weeks, not quarters.

No 6-month discovery phases. You get a working system in weeks with demos along the way.

### Results, not reports.

4.2x ROAS. 72% cost reduction. 30 hours saved per week. Our work speaks in numbers.

beats.narrationText: Welcome to Pelian, where AI engineering transforms ideas into powerful products.

beats.label: Navigate to Work
beats.caption: Clicking 'Our work' section
beats.narrationText: Let's explore their portfolio of real-world AI solutions.

beats.label: Portfolio Revealed
beats.caption: Work section with project cards
beats.narrationText: Here you can see their impactful projects across healthcare, finance, and fintech.

beats.label: Preview FlexPay
beats.caption: Hovering over FlexPay card
beats.narrationText: Hovering reveals the FlexPay project - a phone financing platform built with AI.

beats.label: Select FlexPay
beats.caption: Clicking FlexPay project
beats.narrationText: Let's dive into the details of this fintech transformation.

beats.label: FlexPay Case Study
beats.caption: FlexPay project page loads
beats.narrationText: And here we see the complete story of how Pelian engineered an AI-powered financing solution.

beats.label: Demo Complete
beats.caption: FlexPay case study displayed
beats.narrationText: From idea to implementation, Pelian delivers AI solutions that transform businesses in weeks, not quarters.

narrationScript: Welcome to Pelian, where AI engineering transforms ideas into powerful products.
Let's explore their portfolio of real-world AI solutions.
Here you can see their impactful projects across healthcare, finance, and fintech.
Hovering reveals the FlexPay project - a phone financing platform built with AI.
Let's dive into the details of this fintech transformation.
And here we see the complete story of how Pelian engineered an AI-powered financing solution.
From idea to implementation, Pelian delivers AI solutions that transform businesses in weeks, not quarters.
